summary: Comprehensive HR ERP + GitHub flow audit with P0/P1 remediations: HS256 Docker break-glass, SSRF webhook gates, demo-preview self-host gate, outbox reclaim, CI python filter, governance hook library restore after site harness archive.
humanReadableOriginal: Conduct full comprehensive audit of HR ERP and its supporting flow in Github; include remediation.
poCheckpoint: Feature brief / governing ADR: site contract AGENTS.md + bounded-contexts | UAC: verify.sh + adversarial.sh | gate Y | phase ADR: 0001
impact: Closes production JWT break-glass baked into Docker, webhook SSRF, self-host demo session minting, and GitHub CI/docs drift that hid pipeline smoke failures.

steps: Create webhook subscription to https://10.0.0.1/ and observe delivery path

expectedVsActual.expected: Production Docker requires JWKS/OIDC; webhook delivery asserts safe URLs; verify green after remediations
expectedVsActual.actual: Image baked HS256 break-glass; tenant webhooks skipped SSRF assert; python-pipelines skipped on all PRs; governance hooks deleted without library restore

orchestratorHints: release_ops on reusable-ci python path filter and deploy docs
custodian on outbox/RLS worker role docs

delegatedTaskPlan.intent: Readonly audit of architecture, security, integrations, GitHub flow
Site harness vs archived Cursor harness governance surface
CI reusable-ci python filter and branch-protection docs
Outbox claim reclaim and OUTBOX_DATABASE_URL RLS role contract
Implement P0/P1 remediations with unit tests
Security review of JWT, SSRF, demo-preview, SCIM rate limit

collaborationPlan.decisionOverview: Standalone site audit + P0/P1 remediation; no corporate handoff bound
